name: field
description: A label + control + hint/error wrapper (composition only): composes the label partial, slots the caller's control, and renders an error in a role=alert/aria-live region. Server-first replacement for the Lit island.
docs: Copies the field partial to your JTE root at lievit/field.jte, reached as @template.lievit.field(forId=..., label=..., control=@`...`). Pass the control markup as the `control` Content slot; set the control's aria-describedby to `<forId>-error` so the error is announced. The source is yours: edit freely.
